posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we are trying to copy a speadsheet from excel into monday with fomulas, we know we dont want to embedd, I know of smart spreadsheet, but these add ons are getting expensive and with 10 people an extra $20 a month is just crazy, anyone have a solution for stock managment?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@BNBLEATHER,
you’re looking for a way to copy a spreadsheet from Excel into monday.com with formulas, without using an add-on. Unfortunately, there is no built-in way to do this. However,you can achieve this using Make.
